description_long: This bungalow features a rectangular, two-story structure with a flat roof and a prominent front porch supported by columns. The facade is characterized by large, evenly spaced windows and a balcony running along the upper floor. The property includes a paved driveway with parking spaces, a swimming pool with a poolside umbrella and lounge chairs, and several landscaped trees. The exterior walls are finished in a light color, with contrasting trim around the windows and doors. The front porch is accessible by steps and is flanked by two palm trees, enhancing the tropical ambiance. A white car is parked in the driveway, and the overall layout suggests a modern, suburban residential setting.
description: A modern, two-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, a front porch, balcony, driveway, pool, and landscaped trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, porch with columns, driveway, two palm trees, and the pool area to the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, parked car, and the arrangement of trees along the property edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the balcony, back facade, pool area, and additional landscaping with trees.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view focusing on the pool, umbrella, lounge chairs, and the back of the bungalow with visible balcony.
